headline: Is CME Group (CME) Quietly Undervalued After Launching 24/7 Crypto Derivatives Trading
summary: CME Group (CME) is drawing fresh attention after launching around-the-clock trading for its full cryptocurrency derivatives suite, closing weekend gaps and giving institutional traders continuous tools for managing crypto exposure. See our latest analysis for CME Group. Despite record Q1 2026 revenue and the push into 24/7 crypto derivatives, CME Group’s share price has eased recently, with a 30 day share price return of down 5.53% and a 90 day share price return of down 15.87%. Over a longer...

headline: Does CME Group’s 24/7 Crypto Derivatives Push Reveal a Deeper Innovation Strategy for CME?
summary: CME Group has already launched 24/7 trading for its cryptocurrency futures and options on the CME Globex platform, extending regulated access to products linked to Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, XRP and Avalanche with only a brief weekly maintenance window. This move not only removes the weekend “CME gap” that once shaped crypto trading strategies, but also lets institutional clients manage digital-asset risk continuously during periods of heightened volatility.
